agents.name: gameplay-programmer
agents.description: Implements game mechanics, player systems, combat, and interactive features

agents.name: ui-programmer
agents.description: Implements UI systems: menus, HUDs, inventory screens, dialogue

agents.name: ai-programmer
agents.description: Implements game AI: behavior trees, pathfinding, NPC behavior

agents.name: technical-artist
agents.description: Shaders, VFX, rendering optimization, art pipeline

agents.name: tester
agents.description: Runs tests, validates functionality, reports bugs

agents.name: code-reviewer
agents.description: Reviews code quality, architecture, and standards compliance
